channel.title: Julien on Julien Chien
channel.description: Recent content in Julien on Julien Chien

item.title: Hello World!
item.description:
Hi everyone, this is my personal website.

This will hopefully become the center of my internet presence. I will be writing about things I’ve learned, which could be as simple as summaries, to more complex and “original” things like my thoughts and reflections.

There will hopefully be a bookshelf / book summaries section, where I summarize and review books.

I will probably write about coding related stuff as well, but I’m not yet sure if it should have its own section. Expect to see changes to the site as I add to it.

item.title: Hi!
item.description:
I’m Julien Chien, nice to meet you!

Currently I’m based out of New York City, working at a startup.

I am passionate about tech, economics, running, football (soccer), communities & how they work, urbanism & cities, history, anthropology, and internet phenomena.

Feel free to reach me at hello[at]julienchien.com or on Twitter !
